resume_rule: Read highest non-DONE cluster. Apply 4-gate recipe (re-decompose → compile→wasm → affine-parity green → echo-boundary LOSSLESS → affine-assail clean). Update status to DONE.

string.unblocked_by: Phase F string backend: String.length + indexing + startsWith/endsWith/slice/fromCharCode

effect.unblocked_by: Phase F+ effect codegen: module-level mutable state, Date.now, Console.log

clusters.name: Pure-integer kernel definitions
clusters.description: Leaf kernel types and coprocessor backends in shared/src. No string ops, no effects. First — no dependencies on other migrated files.

done.gates: 8/8 compile; 1223/1223 parity; 6 echo-boundary proofs (agda exit 0); 8/8 assail-clean

clusters.name: VM instruction set
clusters.description: VM instruction modules in vm/lib/ocaml — one file per opcode, pure-integer reversible VM. Also the wasm binding shim.

done_wave1.gates: 4/4 compile; 2100/2100 parity (incl. all reversibility round-trips); 1 echo-boundary LOSSLESS (23-opcode encoding, agda exit 0); 4/4 assail-clean
done_wave1.compiler_findings: unary ~ codegen bug (i32.xor missing operand; workaround -a-1); >> is arithmetic + no >>> (logical shift-right emulated for ROL/ROR)

done_wave2a.note: Mul/Div are pure SCALAR transforms, not memory ops; need no array ABI, so split out of wave 2 and landed ahead of 2b. Reversibility via Bennett ancilla (mul c:=c+a*b) and quotient+remainder (div q*b+r==a for all b).
done_wave2a.gates: 1/1 compile; 3322/3322 parity (incl. mul_roundtrip + div_reconstruct); G3 n/a (numeric transform); 1/1 assail-clean
done_wave2a.compiler_findings: JS a*b loses precision >2^53 -> oracle must use Math.imul to match i32.mul; i32.div_s TRAPS on b==0 and INT_MIN/-1 (ReScript wraps) and i32.rem_s TRAPS on b==0 -> brain guards both (nested-if, avoiding unverified && codegen) for a total wasm

done_wave2b.note: The 'needs array/linear-memory ABI' premise was WRONG. VmState stores memory/stack/port buffers as string-keyed dict slots (_mem:N, _s:N, _pin:port) = host-side senses; the integer brains are all scalar (additive transforms, pointer arithmetic, branch predicates). No array ABI required.
done_wave2b.gates: 4/4 compile; 1568/1568 parity (incl. load/store/sp/recv/send round-trips); G3 n/a (transforms/predicates); 4/4 assail-clean

clusters.name: src/shared coprocessor wiring
clusters.description: Coprocessor bridge layer in src/shared — wrappers exposing kernels to the game engine. Depends on C1.

done.note: All 17 files are host-side senses exposing C1's already-migrated wasm brains. 12 *Coprocessor.res are pure-FFI passthrough (0 logic lines). Kernel_Compute/RetryPolicy (src/shared) are async/float wrappers over C1 brains (compute_gate, is_transient + policy table). DeviceType/GameEvent add string-gated ops (string wall). De-dup verified by constant: compute limits 513/16/259/1024, concurrency 10, is_transient 503/504/429 all match C1 staged kernels exactly.
done.no_4gate: nothing new to compile/parity/prove; the integer cores are C1-verified (Kernel_Compute 736/736, RetryPolicy 124/124)
done.bridges_disposition: stay host-side as essential wasm-loading glue (ADDITIVE, FeaturePacks-flagged); ReScript->glue is a Phase-Omega cutover decision, not a brain migration

clusters.name: Multiplayer coprocessors
clusters.description: Server-authoritative multiplayer in src/app/multiplayer — the coprocessors that run identically in browser and on the Elixir server via wasmex/SNIFS.

clusters.name: Engine coprocessors
clusters.description: Core engine coprocessors: audio state, navigation, resize, maths, random, storage.

done.note: 2 integer brains + 9 senses. Random = deterministic xmur3+mulberry32 PRNG (multiplayer-reproducibility backbone); host iterates the seed string + does the final u32->[0,1) float div, brain owns the i32 mixing. Maths = clamp/lerp-milli/dist_sq (float-wall convention; sqrt host-side).
done.gates: 2/2 compile; 2108/2108 parity (Random bit-exact vs JS source over full i32 + UTF-16 code units); G3 n/a; 2/2 assail-clean

clusters.name: Combat and enemy AI coprocessors
clusters.description: Game simulation: hitbox geometry, HP, difficulty scaling, detection, distraction — pure integer state machines.

done.gates: 8/8 compile; 8185/8185 parity (re-run by parent); 2 echo-boundary LOSSLESS (DualAlert level, SecurityAi phase); 8/8 assail-clean (SecurityAi needed a guard-helper clamp fix at re-verification)

clusters.name: Player coprocessors
clusters.description: Player attribute, loadout, skill and ability coprocessors — pure integer player state.

done.gates: 8/8 compile; 4348/4348 parity (re-run by parent); 6 echo-boundary LOSSLESS proofs (QCertifications, SkillRank, JessicaLoadout x3, JessicaBackground; agda exit 0, re-typechecked by parent); 8/8 assail-clean
done.float_redecompositions: CriticalRoll (min_float/max_float), PlayerAttributes (max_float/min_float), QPrograms (trunc) -> Int-native milli-unit convention; QCertifications f64-comparison pub fns removed host-side. Floats stay host-side (C6 *Int pattern). Parity caught an off-by-100 in PlayerAttributes.

clusters.name: Device and network coprocessors
clusters.description: Device state machine coprocessors: power, network transfer, security rank, covert link.

done.gates: 8/8 compile; 26095/26095 parity (re-run by parent); 5 echo-boundary LOSSLESS (security-level, device-type/security-colour ordinals, covert-link type/state); 8/8 assail-clean (NetworkManager + SecurityRank needed a guard-helper clamp fix at re-verification)

clusters.name: Game loop, AffineTEA, and VeriSim types
clusters.description: Top-level game loop, AffineTEA architecture, VeriSim integration types, and the entry point.

clusters.name: Utils, tools, companions, narrative, and proven modules
clusters.description: Game utilities, tools coprocessors, Moletaire companion, mission briefing, and formal-proof integration.

clusters.name: UI and accessibility coprocessors
clusters.description: UI widget logic, font scaling, i18n, keyboard navigation, popup logic — pure integer presentation state.

done.note: All 10 files are host-side senses. DualAlert integer brain already extracted in C6 (DualAlert.affine, 613/613 parity, LOSSLESS boundary proof). DualAlertCoprocessor.res = bridge to C6 wasm. ForceLayoutCoprocessor.res = bridge to float-only physics wasm (euclidean/repulsion/attraction/velocity/alpha kernel; float-wall: deferred host-side). Button/HubButton/NavButton/Label/VolumeSlider/InventoryUI/HardwareWiring = pure PixiJS/UI senses with zero integer computation.
done.no_4gate: nothing new to compile/parity/prove; DualAlert integer core C6-verified (613/613), float physics stays host-side

clusters.name: Render-glue screens, UI, and bindings
clusters.description: Screen implementations, render-logic coprocessors, and PixiJS bindings. Migrated last — these call the AffineScript brain from the host JS/Pixi layer.

clusters.name: Test harnesses
clusters.description: Existing ReScript test harnesses — when coprocessors migrate these become affine-parity harnesses, not direct migrations.
